name: Wealth Market Research
description: Returns Meridian house-view commentary, sector outlooks, and macro analysis for wealth management clients. A knowledge agent — no client entity required. Available topics: equities, fixed_income, alternatives, macro. Omit topic for the broad quarterly outlook.

skills.name: get_market_research
skills.description: Retrieve Meridian house view, sector outlooks, and market commentary. No client entity required — general research available to all wealth segment users.
examples: what is the current house view on equities
Meridian outlook on fixed income for this quarter
what sectors do you recommend for H2 2026
what is the investment team's view on alternatives
what is Meridian's view on private credit
what sectors are overweight in the model portfolio
